author: user@example.com
name: Pterodactyl Panel Web
description: Menjalankan Pterodactyl Panel (Laravel) dengan Nginx + PHP-FPM. Tidak termasuk Wings, tidak bisa mengelola host.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Pterodactyl Panel Installation Script

apk add --no-cache git curl unzip

cd /home/container

# Clone panel jika belum ada
if [ ! -f ".env" ]; then
    echo "Menginstall Pterodactyl Panel..."
    git clone https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel.git .
    
    export COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
    curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php
    php composer.phar install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader
    
    cp .env.example .env
    
    # Generate key
    php artisan key:generate --force
fi

# Buat startup script
echo '#!/bin/bash
cd /home/container

# Export COMPOSER
export COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1

# Setup Nginx configuration
mkdir -p /etc/nginx/http.d/
cat > /etc/nginx/http.d/panel.conf << NGINX_CONF
server {
    listen ${WEB_PORT:-8080};
    server_name _;
    root /home/container/public;
    index index.php index.html;

    access_log /home/container/logs/panel.log;
    error_log /home/container/logs/error.log;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.php?$args;
    }

    location ~ \.php$ {
        fastcgi_pass unix:/run/php-fpm.sock;
        fastcgi_index index.php;
        fastcgi_param SCRIPT_FILENAME $document_root$fastcgi_script_name;
        include fastcgi_params;
    }

    location ~ /\.ht {
        deny all;
    }
}
NGINX_CONF

# Setup PHP-FPM
cat > /usr/local/etc/php-fpm.d/www.conf << PHP_CONF
[www]
user = container
group = container
listen = /run/php-fpm.sock
listen.owner = container
listen.group = container
pm = dynamic
pm.max_children = 10
pm.start_servers = 2
pm.min_spare_servers = 1
pm.max_spare_servers = 5
PHP_CONF

# Setup direktori
mkdir -p logs storage storage/logs bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 755 storage bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 777 storage/logs logs

# Setup environment variables dari file config
if [ -f .env ]; then
    # Update .env dengan environment variables dari panel
    if [ ! -z "$APP_URL" ]; then
        sed -i "s|APP_URL=.*|APP_URL=${APP_URL}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$DB_HOST" ]; then
        sed -i "s|DB_HOST=.*|DB_HOST=${DB_HOST}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$DB_PORT" ]; then
        sed -i "s|DB_PORT=.*|DB_PORT=${DB_PORT}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$DB_DATABASE" ]; then
        sed -i "s|DB_DATABASE=.*|DB_DATABASE=${DB_DATABASE}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$DB_USERNAME" ]; then
        sed -i "s|DB_USERNAME=.*|DB_USERNAME=${DB_USERNAME}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$DB_PASSWORD" ]; then
        sed -i "s|DB_PASSWORD=.*|DB_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$APP_ENV" ]; then
        sed -i "s|APP_ENV=.*|APP_ENV=${APP_ENV}|" .env
    fi
    if [ ! -z "$APP_DEBUG" ]; then
        sed -i "s|APP_DEBUG=.*|APP_DEBUG=${APP_DEBUG}|" .env
    fi
    
    # Cache konfigurasi
    php artisan config:cache
    php artisan route:cache
    php artisan view:cache
    
    # Jalankan migration jika AUTO_MIGRATION=true
    if [ "${AUTO_MIGRATION}" = "true" ]; then
        php artisan migrate --force
    fi
fi

# Start Cloudflare Tunnel jika diaktifkan
if [ "${CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL}" = "true" ] && [ ! -z "${CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
    if [ ! -f "cloudflared" ]; then
        curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64 -o cloudflared
        chmod +x cloudflared
    fi
    ./cloudflared tunnel --no-autoupdate run --token ${CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN} &
fi

# Start PHP-FPM
echo "Starting PHP-FPM..."
php-fpm -D

# Start Nginx
echo "Starting Nginx..."
exec nginx -g "daemon off;"
' > /home/container/start.sh

chmod +x /home/container/start.sh

echo "Instalasi selesai."

variables.name: Database Host
variables.description: Host database untuk panel (gunakan host eksternal, jangan localhost)

variables.name: APP Debug
variables.description: Aktifkan debug mode (true/false) - Jangan aktifkan di production

variables.name: Web Port
variables.description: Port yang digunakan untuk web server

variables.name: Cloudflare Token
variables.description: Token untuk Cloudflare Tunnel (hanya jika CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL=true)
